finalFourContext.validationReason: stage pace is derived from archived minute-by-minute pressure events; only leave-one-tournament-out improvements are blended

finalFourModel.conclusion: 存在通过安全边际的统计价值

halfFullSignal.note: Aggregates the specialist half-time/full-time distribution into a conservative W/D/L calibration signal.
